allow: PowerShell($asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\('C:\\Users\\domin\\.nuget\\packages\\avalonia.controls.webview\\12.0.0\\lib\\net8.0\\Avalonia.Controls.WebView.dll'\); try { $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; $types | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'Adapter|NativeWebView|Snapshot|Capture' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \('=== {0} ===' -f $_.FullName\); $_.GetMethods\(\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.ToString\(\) } })

PowerShell($asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\('C:\\Users\\domin\\.nuget\\packages\\avalonia.controls.webview\\12.0.0\\lib\\net8.0\\Avalonia.Controls.WebView.dll'\); try { $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; Write-Output \("Type count: " + $types.Count\); $types | Select-Object -First 80 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.FullName })

PowerShell(try { $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\('C:\\Users\\domin\\.nuget\\packages\\avalonia.controls.webview\\12.0.0\\lib\\net8.0\\Avalonia.Controls.WebView.dll'\); $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; $nv = $types | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq 'Avalonia.Controls.NativeWebView' }; $nv.GetMethods\(\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_.ToString\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\('C:\\Users\\domin\\.nuget\\packages\\avalonia.controls.webview\\12.0.0\\lib\\net8.0\\Avalonia.Controls.WebView.dll'\); $types = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $types = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; foreach \($n in @\('Avalonia.Controls.WebViewAdapter','Avalonia.Controls.IWebView','Avalonia.Controls.WebViewAdapterEventArgs','Avalonia.Controls.IWebViewAdapterWithCommands','Avalonia.Controls.INativeWebViewControlImpl'\)\) { $t = $types | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq $n } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($t\) { Write-Output \('=== ' + $n + ' ==='\); $t.GetMembers\(\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \('  ' + $_.MemberType + ' ' + $_.ToString\(\)\) } } })
